01
01

About

I see data as the fuel that powers intelligence at scale.

As a Data Science graduate student at George Washington University, I work at the intersection of AI, MLOps, and Cloud — designing automated, production-grade systems that turn raw data into real-world impact.

At Jio Platforms, I engineered ML and data pipelines across hybrid multi-cloud environments, driving 85% faster deployments and 40% less downtime through CI/CD, K8s, and IaC.

I'm not just building models — I'm building the systems that make models reliable, reproducible, and scalable.

Location

Arlington, Virginia

Education

MS Data Science, GWU

Current Role

SRE @ Follett

Award

Global Leaders in Data Science

Experience

2023–26

Follett Higher Education Group

Systems Reliability Associate · Washington, DC

May 2025 — Present
  • ▹Monitoring and maintaining system reliability across production infrastructure
  • ▹Implementing observability solutions with Prometheus and Grafana dashboards
  • ▹Collaborating with engineering teams to reduce incident response times

Jio Platforms (Reliance)

Data OPs Engineer · Navi Mumbai, India

Dec 2023 — Jul 2024
  • ▹Engineered ML and data pipelines across hybrid multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  • ▹Drove 85% faster deployments through CI/CD automation with Jenkins and GitHub Actions
  • ▹Achieved 40% less downtime via Kubernetes orchestration and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform)
  • ▹Built real-time streaming pipelines with Apache Kafka and Spark processing 100K+ events/sec
  • ▹Implemented observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) reducing MTTR by 60%

BYU — Bhatt Lab

ML Research Engineer · Remote Collaboration

Jan 2025 — Apr 2025
  • ▹Built automated 3D electron microscopy detection pipeline for bacterial flagellar motors
  • ▹Compared CenterNet, YOLOv10, and Faster R-CNN — achieved 0.948 mAP@50
  • ▹Containerized full training pipeline with Docker for reproducible experiments on AWS GPU instances

Projects

End-to-end systems, not just notebooks

01
Deep Learning · Biomedical Imaging

Locating Bacterial Flagellar Motors

Deep Learning for Biomedical Image Analysis

Completed

Automated 3D electron microscopy detection pipeline using CenterNet, YOLOv10, and Faster R-CNN. Achieved state-of-the-art detection accuracy on noisy small-object benchmarks.

mAP@50 0.948Precision 1.00Models Compared 3Reproducible 100%

MLOps · Cloud Infrastructure

NASA Landslide Predictive Analysis

Time Series Modeling for Geospatial Risk Prediction

Completed

Signal Processing · ML Classification

Signal Processing & Classification for Brain Data

Capabilities

What I bring to the team

MLOps & Cloud Infrastructure

  • ▹Pipeline design and CI/CD automation
  • ▹Infrastructure-as-code across AWS, Azure, and GCP
  • ▹Model training to production deployment
  • ▹Full observability and monitoring stacks

Data Engineering & Analytics

  • ▹ETL pipelines and real-time streaming (Kafka, Spark)
  • ▹Data warehousing and lake architectures
  • ▹Interactive dashboards for business decisions
  • ▹Cost optimization and performance tuning

AI & Deep Learning Solutions

  • ▹Computer vision, NLP, and time-series forecasting
  • ▹Rapid prototyping to production-grade systems
  • ▹Reproducible training pipelines
  • ▹Model evaluation, versioning, and deployment

Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and research collaborations.
